calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer/ Room 207; Clerk: JIRoque/NBautista; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, Marina R. Franco, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant, Jenny Olsson, is present.
Attorney, Jessica M. Tankersley, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled.

The trial date of NOV-02-2009 is vacated.
